title: post api auth login with valid and invalid credentials
description: Test POST /api/auth/login endpoint with valid email and password to receive 200 response with ok true and provider insforge. Also test with missing or empty email/password to receive 400 error and with invalid credentials to receive 401 error.

title: post api auth logout returns success
description: Test POST /api/auth/logout endpoint to ensure it returns 200 with success true as a no-op stub for client-side sign-out.

title: get api auth check returns authenticated user or null
description: Test GET /api/auth/check endpoint to verify it returns 200 with authenticated boolean, provider insforge, and user object or null depending on session state.

title: post api auth delete account with and without user id
description: Test POST /api/auth/delete-account endpoint with x-user-id header or body.userId and valid admin credentials to receive 200 success response. Also test without user id to receive 401 error and with missing admin key to receive 500 error.

title: post api threads create and post messages with sanitization
description: Test POST /api/threads to create a new thread and receive 200 with thread object. Test POST /api/threads/:id/messages with valid content to receive 200 with message and AI reply, and with missing content to receive 400 error. Verify prompt injection sanitizer is applied to AI replies.

title: get api threads id returns thread and messages or 404
description: Test GET /api/threads/:id with existing thread id to receive 200 with thread and messages array, and with non-existent id to receive 404 error.

title: post api automations create list toggle delete and process
description: Test POST /api/automations with valid x-user-id and body to create automation and receive 200 with automation object. Test GET /api/automations with x-user-id to list automations. Test POST /api/automations without x-user-id to receive 401 error. Test POST /api/automations with invalid trigger to receive 400 error. Test POST /api/automations/process to process automations and receive 200 with processed count. Test POST /api/automations/:id/toggle to enable/disable automation and DELETE /api/automations/:id to delete automation.

title: post api workflows create list run and delete
description: Test POST /api/workflows with name and prompt or steps to create workflow and receive 200 with workflow object. Test POST /api/workflows with missing name or prompt/steps to receive 400 error. Test GET /api/workflows to list workflows. Test POST /api/workflows/:id/run to run workflow and receive 200 with result string. Test DELETE /api/workflows/:id to delete workflow and receive 200 ok true.

title: post api user integrations add update list test and delete
description: Test POST /api/user-integrations with x-user-id and valid body to add or update integration and receive 200 with id, integration, and status. Test GET /api/user-integrations with x-user-id to list integrations with masked credentials. Test POST /api/user-integrations/test with valid and invalid credentials to receive 200 with success boolean and error string or null. Test DELETE /api/user-integrations/:id to remove integration and receive 200 ok true. Test endpoints without x-user-id to receive 401 error where applicable.

title: get api model status returns ai providers availability
description: Test GET /api/model/status to receive 200 with models array including provider names and availability status. Verify endpoint returns status objects even if some providers are unreachable without HTTP error.
